awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A community driven list of ClojureScript frameworks, libraries and wrappers.
awesomeList.description: A community driven list of ClojureScript frameworks, libraries and wrappers.

nodes.itemHTML: • ClojureScript Unraveled – An open source book about the ClojureScript language that covers all the language features, how to use the compiler and the tooling for building applications and libraries.
• ClojureScript: Up and Running – An introduction to ClojureScript written by big guns of Clojure Stuart Sierra and Luke VanderHart.
• Etudes for ClojureScript – A hands-on-book of 30 companion exercises or études for introducing ClojureScript.
• Learning ClojureScript – Master the art of agile single page web application development with ClojureScript.
• Transforming Data with ClojureScript – A beginner's guide to ClojureScript with interactive examples and exercises, "focusing on the main task that programming does—transforming data".
• ClojureScript Koans – A great way to start learning Clojure and ClojureScript on the web with interactive challanges.
• Lambda Island – A full-stack web development course including front-end with ClojureScript, back-end with Clojure, language essentials, security, internet standards and system administration.
• Learn Reagent – An introduction to ClojureScript with Reagent for developers. 1 hour free content is available. learn re-frame is its follow up.
• Learning ClojureScript – A 2h 11m long introduction to Clojurescript by O'Really Online Learning. Also available on Udemy.

• ClojureScript for Skeptics – Derek Slager's talk for Clojure Conj 2015 where he is Discussing the many reasons why ClojureScript is in fact a very pragmatic language to consider for web development.
• Interactive programming Flappy Bird in ClojureScript – A 5 minutes video from 2014 demostrating the power of ClojureScript's developer experience.
• kibitstars1.7k – Static code analyzer to find patterns of code that could be rewritten with a more idiomatic function or macro.
• Amblystars535 – A ClojureScript REPL into iOS JavaScriptCore.
• lein-cljsbuildstars1.1k – A Leiningen plugin to make ClojureScript development easy.
• shadow-cljsstars1.6k – ClojureScript compilation made easy
• Tempurastars217 – A Clojure(Script) i18n library, succeeding Tower
• hxstars240 – A simple, easy to use library for React development in ClojureScript.
• Omstars6.7k – A powerful interface to React, makes use of its object oriented structures.
• Quiescentstars608 – It favors functional style, fully stateless.
• Reagent – Minimalistic, feature complete.
• Rumstars1.5k – Decomplected, extensible, simple.
• Manifold-cljsstars42 – A port of Manifoldstars852 to ClojureScript.
• Fulcro – A library for development of single-page full-stack web applications in clj/cljs.
• Mr-Clean – A reagent compatible library without react.js dependency.
• Preceptstars627 – A declarative programming framework.
• Instaparsestars89 – It aims to be the simplest way to build parsers in ClojureScript.
• Trussstars240 – An opinionated assertions API for Clojure/ClojureScript.
• Respostars231 – A responsive DOM library, inspired by React.
• cljsxstars4 – JSX for Clojure and ClojureScript, also works with Inferno, Nerv, Preact, Snabbdomestars8.9k and others.
• Quilstars2.6k – A processing and graphics programming library.
• form-validator-cljsstars46 – Validate forms with spec and fn.
• cljs.test – Integrated test framework for ClojureScript (merged from clojurescript.teststars167)
• specqlstars119 – Library for simple PostgreSQL queries with namespaced keys.
• Tuckstars26 – A micro framework for building Reagent apps that have a clean separation of view code and event processing code.
• namespacefystars16 – A simple Clojure(Script) library which aims to make it easy to keep map keys namespaced, no matter where your data comes from.
• Gardenstars1.2k – A library for rendering CSS in Clojure and ClojureScript.
• stylefystars279 – stylefy makes it possible to define UI component styles as Clojure data and attach them into components easily without writing CSS selectors
• cljs-ajaxstars604 – A simple Ajax client for ClojureScript and Clojure.
• Lumostars1.8k – Fast, cross-platform, standalone ClojureScript environment.
• Keechma – Micro frontend framework for ClojureScript and Reagent.
• Cljsonstars63 – Clojure/ClojureScript library for accelerated browser data deserialization.
• Transitstars293 – A data interchange format and set of libraries for conveying values between applications written in different programming languages.
• Konservestars247 – A clojuresque key-value/document store protocol with core.async.
• lein-figwheelstars2.9k – Leiningen plugin that pushes ClojureScript code changes to the client.
• Cratestars213 – A ClojureScript implementation of Hiccup.
• Dommystars751 – A no-nonsense ClojureScript templating and DOM manipulation library.
• Sablonostars672 – Lisp/Hiccup style templating for Facebook's React in ClojureScript.
• geomstars764 – A 2D/3D geometry toolkit for Clojure/Clojurescript.
• markdown-cljstars471 – Markdown parser in Clojure/ClojureScript.
• reformsstars170 – Beautiful Bootstrap 3 forms for Om and Reagent.
• re-comstars699 – A ClojureScript library of reusable components for Reagent.
• platostars28 – Incrementally persists atom state to Local Storage in ClojureScript.
• storage-atomstars186 – ClojureScript atoms backed by HTML5 web storage.
• Chestnutstars1.3k – An Application template for ClojureScript/Om with live reloading.
• WebFUIstars235 – Client-Side Web Framework for ClojureScript.
• Quamolitstars48 – A tiny declarative animation library , inspired by React.
• cljs-devtoolsstars979 – Better presentation of ClojureScript values in Chrome Devtools.
• Kioostars408 – DOM manipulation and templating library for Facebook's React and Om in ClojureScript.
• Keybindstars71 – Library for handling key bindings (shortcuts) in browser.
• Sepal.cljstars23 – A library to generate Clojure code from a vector of strings and vectors with macro system.
• descjopstars393 – A template for Web based desktop application with Electron.
• electron-templatestars112 – A template for creating web based desktop applications with Electron, ClojureScript and Reagent.
• Chordstars417 – Designed to bridge the gap between the triad of CLJ/CLJS, web-sockets and core.async.
• Planckstars995 – A stand-alone ClojureScript REPL for macOS and Linux based on JavaScriptCore.
• Ribol – Conditional restarts for clojure/clojurescript.
• Sentestars1.6k – Clojure(Script) + core.async + WebSockets/Ajax.
• Devcardsstars1.4k – Devcards aims to provide a visual REPL experience for ClojureScript.
• Routerstars77 – Bidirectional Ring router for Clojure/Script. REST oriented.
• Secretarystars762 – A client-side router for ClojureScript.
• codoxstars585 – A tool for generating API documentation from Clojure or ClojureScript source code.
• componentstars1.9k – Managed lifecycle of stateful objects in Clojure(Script).
• mountstars1.1k – A beautifl idiomatic state management library.
• Macchiatostars351 – It aims to provide an easy to use platform for Node.js.
• Purnam – A ClojureScript library designed to provide better clojurescript/javascript interop, testing and documentation tools.
• Fetchstars207 – A ClojureScript library that makes client/server interaction painless.
• reagent-formsstars329 – Bootstrap form components for Reagent.
• om-toolsstars441 – It aims to provide higher-order abstractions and utilities frequently useful when building components with Om's API.
• Clopsstars173 – An opinionated, full stack and easy to use web framework.
• Dominatorstars74 – Virtual-Dom in ClojureScript.
• Enfocus – A DOM manipulation and templating library for ClojureScript inspired by Enlive.
• Freactivestars391 – A high-performance, pure Clojurescript, declarative DOM library inspired by reagent, om, reflex and hiccup.
• json-htmlstars144 – Provide JSON and get a DOM node with a human representation of that JSON.
• Castrastars158 – An HTTP remote procedure call handler for Clojure.
• Javelinstars728 – A Functional Reactive Programming library for ClojureScript.
• hodgepodge – A idiomatic ClojureScript interface to HTML5 Storage.
• Bidistars945 – A Clojure(script) data driven routing library.
• Bardostars91 – A Clojure(Script) library for functional interpolation and transitions.
• test.checkstars1k – A generative property-based testing tool inspired by QuickCheck.
• Tenzing – A ClojureScript template with no backend that uses Boot.
• Reagistars222 – An FRP library for Clojure and ClojureScript, built on top of core.async.
• Bruthastars138 – A simple and functional ClojureScript interface to React.
• Entanglementstars40 – It creates atoms from other atoms and links the data together.
• rx-cljsstars44 – A ClojureScript wrapper for Reactive Extensions (Rx) for Javascript.
• Yolk – A thin ClojureScript wrapper around bacon.js.
• Jayqstars411 – A ClojureScript wrapper for jQuery.
• Miesstars364 – A minimal ClojureScript project template.
• CLJSJS – An easy way for Clojurescript developers to depend on Javascript libraries.
• core.asyncstars1.8k – A Clojure(Script) library designed to provide facilities for async programming and communication.
• Automatstars565 – A Clojure(Script) library for defining and using finite-state automata, inspired by Ragel.
• Validateur – A Clojure validation library inspired by Ruby's ActiveModel.
• Specljstars410 – A TDD/BDD framework for Clojure and ClojureScript.
• atw-omstars40 – A web application template with Clojure/Compojure, ClojureScript/Om & core.async.
• Hoplon – Write everything in Clojure and ClojureScript, clientside and serverside.
• Luminus – It aims to provide a robust, scalable, and easy to use platform.
• re-framestars4.8k – A Reagent Framework For Writing SPAs, in Clojurescript.
• Towerstars265 – A Clojure(Script) i18n & L10n library.
• Bouncerstars355 – A validation DSL for Clojure & Clojurescript applications.
• Hickorystars500 – It parses HTML into Clojure data structures, so you can analyze, transform, and output back to HTML.
• Waltzstars91 – A ClojureScript library that helps manage state in client-side applications using non-deterministic finite state machines.
• Expectations – A minimalist's unit testing framework.
• Silkstars217 – An isomorphic routing library for Clojure & ClojureScript.
• Monetstars167 – A small ClojureScript library to make it easier to work with canvas and visuals.
• C2 – It lets you declaratively create HTML and SVG markup based on data.
• inflections-cljstars193 – Rails-like inflection library for Clojure and ClojureScript.
• Datascriptstars4.1k – An immutable in-memory database and Datalog query engine in ClojureScript.
• Jakistars15 – A simple ClojureScript CouchDB client.
• cljs-bindingstars56 – It binds html elements to ClojureScript functions.
• Hiccupsstars186 – A ClojureScript port of the Hiccup.
• Pylonstars47 – A Javascript class system in 100% Clojurescript.
